item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 2min The Bengals are giving DT Dexter Lawrence a one-year, $28 million contract extension
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 2min The Bengals are giving DT Dexter Lawrence a one-year, $28 million contract extension, per @RapSheet
https:// nfl.com/news/nfl-netwo rk-giants-trading-dt-dexter-lawrence-to-bengals-in-exchange-for-2026-no-10-overall-pick?campaign=Twitter_atn … 1 1 1 1 mil

item.title: RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 29min Officially official. Cita Cincinnati Bengals @Bengals · 32min We have acquired DT Dexter
item.description:
Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 29min Officially official. Cita Cincinnati Bengals @Bengals · 32min We have acquired DT Dexter Lawrence II in a trade with the N.Y. Giants.
: http:// go.bengals.com/3QaEAmK 31 29 356 129 mil
